test.command: cargo test -j 4 && (cd src-tauri && cargo test -j 4) && (cd frontend && npm test -- --run)

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md compare-flow route placeholder from /api/sessions/:sid/compare to /api/sessions/{session_id}/compare to match Axum 0.8 route conventions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align mission-level commit message guidance with repository guidance for dependency-only work (allow chore/chore(deps) where applicable).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Repeated reviewer observations across m2-rust-edition-2024-bump, m2-rust-deps-patch-and-minor-bumps, and m2-react-19-migration noted conflict between mission AGENTS feat/fix/refactor-only guidance and repo AGENTS allowing chore(deps).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit exception path for dependency/edition migration features where red-first test creation is not meaningful; require compatibility-focused validation instead.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer observations from m2-rust-edition-2024-bump, m2-rust-deps-patch-and-minor-bumps, and m2-tauri-patch-bump all reported friction with strict mandatory failing-test-first wording for dependency-only scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a dependency-migration/codemod exception to strict red-first requirements while keeping full validation requirements intact.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer observations for m2-react-19-migration and m2-typescript-5.8-bump flagged ambiguity/rigidity around failing-test-first for dependency-only frontend upgrades.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify precedence when a feature explicitly requires agent-browser validation so workers do not interpret the current prohibition as absolute.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-axum-0.8-upgrade reviewer identified conflict between rust-worker instruction to avoid agent-browser and milestone/feature-specific requirements that included browser smoke checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify off-limits guidance for ~/.cargo in cases where a feature explicitly requests a global tool upgrade (e.g., tauri-cli) to avoid policy contradiction.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-tauri-patch-bump reviewer flagged conflict between mission off-limits guidance and feature instruction to run `cargo install tauri-cli --force`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Additional repeated commit-guidance mismatch reports from individual reviews.
Additional repeated red→green rigidity comments with identical dependency-only context.
